Customers can check their mobile data balance in the telco app under Usage.
Roaming can be activated from the telco app or web portal before travelling.
SIM card replacement can be requested at any service centre with identity verification.
Bills are generated on the same billing cycle every month.
Late payment may result in temporary suspension of service.
Customers can upgrade their mobile plan through the app or customer portal.
Customers can terminate their line by contacting customer support or visiting a service centre.
Broadband installation usually takes 3 to 5 working days after confirmation.
International roaming charges vary by country and plan.
Password reset can be done through the login page using the Forgot Password option.
Customers who suspect fraud should immediately contact the telco fraud hotline.
eSIM activation requires scanning the QR code provided after purchase.
Network issues can be reported through the support hotline or app chat.
Refund requests are reviewed within 5 to 7 working days.
Number port-in usually takes 1 to 3 working days after successful verification.
